# Print Attribution & Preferences

> Established February 2026. Every printed document can now show who generated it, when, and what type of document it is.

---

## What Changed

### 1. Document Attribution ("Generated by" line)

Every PDF and browser-printed document now includes a subtle attribution line just above the footer:

```
Generated by Chef David's Kitchen  ·  Prep Sheet  ·  Feb 28, 2026, 3:45 PM
```

This shows:

- **Who** generated the document (chef's business name or custom name)
- **What** type of document it is (Prep Sheet, Grocery List, etc.)
- **When** it was generated (timestamp)

### 2. Chef-Controlled Preferences

Chefs can configure attribution via **Settings > Print & Documents**:

| Setting            | Default            | Description                                                 |
| ------------------ | ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| Show attribution   | ON                 | Toggle the "Generated by" line on/off                       |
| Attribution name   | (business name)    | Override with custom name, or leave blank for business name |
| Default print mode | Standard           | Default paper format: standard, 80mm thermal, 58mm thermal  |
| Custom footer      | (ChefFlow default) | Replace the default footer text with your own branding      |

### 3. Where Attribution Appears

| Document Surface                  | Attribution Method                                                       |
| --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| All 11 PDF document types         | `pdf.generatedBy(name, docType)` — gray text, 7pt, centered above footer |
| Combined 8-page event packet      | Each page gets its own attribution line                                  |
| Station Clipboard (browser print) | `PrintableDocument` `generatedBy` prop                                   |
| Order Sheet (browser print)       | `PrintableDocument` `generatedBy` prop                                   |
| Commerce Receipt (thermal PDF)    | Business name already in receipt header                                  |

---

## Architecture

### Server Action: `lib/print/actions.ts`

| Function                          | What it does                                                      |
| --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `getPrintPreferences()`           | Returns the chef's print preferences (with defaults)              |
| `getDocumentAttribution()`        | Resolves the "Generated by" name — returns `null` if disabled     |
| `updatePrintPreferences(updates)` | Saves updated preferences to `chef_preferences.print_preferences` |

### PDF Layout: `lib/documents/pdf-layout.ts`

New method on `PDFLayout`:

```ts
pdf.generatedBy(name: string, docType?: string)
// Renders: "Generated by {name}  ·  {docType}  ·  {timestamp}"
// Position: centered, 4mm above the footer line
// Style: 7pt, gray (#8c8c8c), normal weight
```

### PrintableDocument Component

New prop:

```tsx
<PrintableDocument
  title="Station Clipboard"
  generatedBy="Chef David's Kitchen"  // or undefined to hide
  mode="standard"
>
```

### Database

Migration `20260329000003_print_preferences.sql` adds:

```sql
ALTER TABLE chef_preferences
  ADD COLUMN print_preferences jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{
    "show_attribution": true,
    "attribution_name": null,
    "default_print_mode": "standard",
    "custom_footer": null
  }'::jsonb;
```

### Settings UI

- **Page:** `/settings/print` → `app/(chef)/settings/print/page.tsx`
- **Form component:** `components/settings/print-settings-form.tsx`
- **Settings hub link:** Added under "Your Business" group with Printer icon

---

| `lib/documents/generate-event-summary.ts`                  | Added optional `generatedByName` param        |

| `lib/documents/generate-travel-route.ts`                   | Added optional `generatedByName` param        |
| `lib/documents/generate-content-shot-list.ts`              | Added optional `generatedByName` param        |

| `supabase/migrations/20260329000003_print_preferences.sql` | New migration                                 |
| `app/(chef)/settings/print/page.tsx`                       | New settings page                             |
| `components/settings/print-settings-form.tsx`              | New settings form component                   |
| `components/settings/settings-category.tsx`                | Added Printer icon to icon map                |
| `app/(chef)/settings/page.tsx`                             | Added Print & Documents category link         |

---

## Why This Matters

In a kitchen with multiple staff printing documents, you need to know:

- **Who** printed this prep sheet? Was it the head chef or the sous?
- **When** was this grocery list generated? Is it from today or yesterday's version?
- **What** document is this page from? When 8 pages come off the printer at once, each page identifies itself.

The chef can turn it off if they work solo and don't need the tracking. Smart defaults — ON by default, customizable when needed.
